cross_disciplinary_pairing.description: AgriLens AI pairs the offline LLM with a retrieval layer over real agronomy references (maize disease diagnosis guides, pest management protocols, fertilizer application tables, planting calendars, and harvesting best practices). The RAG layer is load-bearing, not decorative: every diagnostic or treatment answer is grounded in a retrieved passage from the local corpus, and the prompt instructs the model to say when no matching document was found rather than guessing. This directly serves smallholder maize farmers who lack reliable internet access to extension officers or agronomy websites.

test_prompts.prompt: The lower leaves of my maize plants have long grey-green water-soaked streaks that turned tan and dry. What disease is this, and how do I treat it?
I am planting maize this season on a small plot with average soil fertility. What fertilizer type and quantity should I apply at planting, and when should I top-dress?
